message:
feat(fp-frame): add reindex_fill, rolling center, and pivot_table_multi_values

- DataFrame.reindex_fill(labels, fill_value): static fill for missing labels
- Series.rolling_center(window): centered rolling window computation
- DataFrame.pivot_table_multi_values(values_list): pivot with multiple
  value columns producing prefixed column names
- 3 new tests (869 total)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
